name: Flaming Skull
$frames: Frames auto-discover from the folder: `asset` is the base pose, and any `<stem>_1.png`, `<stem>_2.png`, … next to it join that pose's ping-pong loop in index order (1 = static, 2 = alternate, 3+ = smooth). Just drop frame files in — no manifest edit needed. An explicit `frames: [...]` on an entry overrides discovery. Filenames are semantic — name a file by what the pose IS and the contract just works.
